props.name: hpadding
props.description: Horizontal padding applied to the scrollable content.

props.name: vpadding
props.description: Vertical padding applied to the scrollable content.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the scrollable container. Defaults to 50vh if not specified.

props.name: offsetHeight
props.description: The visible height of the scrollable area. Read-only, set by the component.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: The total scrollable height including overflow. Read-only, set by the component.
